title: A Survey of Agentic AI for Banking Service Operations
abstract: This survey reviews agentic AI capabilities for banking service operations, compliance assistance, and workflow orchestration in enterprise environments.

title: Enterprise Multi-Agent Governance Frameworks for Information Systems
abstract: The paper proposes an information systems framework for governing enterprise multi-agent deployments with measurable business controls.

title: A Review of Agentic Decision Support in Financial Services
abstract: This review synthesizes agentic decision support systems in financial services with a focus on organizational adoption and performance.

title: Benchmarking Autonomous Agents for Enterprise Planning
abstract: We benchmark multi-agent planning systems for enterprise task execution and compare orchestration strategies under realistic workload constraints.

title: Surveying Business-Oriented Agentic Workflows with Large Models
abstract: This survey summarizes business-facing agentic workflows built on large models and distills reusable workflow design patterns.

title: ICML Methods for Reliable Agent Tool Use in Enterprises
abstract: A methods paper on reliable agent tool use with enterprise constraints, grounding, and structured evaluation.

title: AAAI Perspectives on Commercial Agent Collaboration
abstract: The study investigates commercial agent collaboration patterns and their impact on complex service workflows.

title: IJCAI Survey on Multi-Agent Reasoning for Regulated Industries
abstract: This survey covers multi-agent reasoning approaches for regulated industries, especially finance and public-sector operations.

title: Agentic Customer Support Orchestration in Banking
abstract: The paper studies banking customer support orchestration with agentic AI and practical business metrics for value capture.

title: Information Systems Review of Human-Agent Workflow Design
abstract: A review of human-agent workflow design with implications for organizational change and enterprise process redesign.

title: Financial Agent Memory Architectures for High-Stakes Decisions
abstract: We propose memory architectures for high-stakes financial agent systems and measure downstream decision quality.

title: Service Operations with AI Agents: A Survey
abstract: This survey summarizes service operations with AI agents and highlights enterprise readiness, governance, and business fit.
